description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for platform and device combined analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Device category: desktop / mobile / tablet. Combined with platform for cross-analysis.
Platform or operating system used (e.g. web / iOS / Android). Identifies the app or browser environment.
Number of key/conversion events recorded for this device + platform combination.
Total number of users for this device + platform combination.
Total GA4 events fired on this device + platform combination.
Number of first-time users for this device + platform combination.
Ratio of engaged sessions to total sessions (0.0–1.0). Multiply by 100 for percentage.
Number of engaged sessions for this device + platform combination.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
Total revenue attributed to this device + platform combination (in account currency).
